articles.title: How to Source Wholesale Fabric from China: A Practical Guide for Apparel Buyers
articles.excerpt: A practical framework for turning an apparel idea into a usable fabric brief, comparing samples, and asking suppliers the questions that make a wholesale quote meaningful.
articles.coverAlt: Editorial image of hands comparing fabric swatches beside rolls of lace, mesh, satin, and cotton
articles.coverCaption: Editorial image illustrating fabric selection for a sourcing brief.
articles.author: YAQIXIN Editorial Team
articles.seoTitle: How to Source Wholesale Fabric from China | YAQIXIN
articles.metaDescription: A practical wholesale fabric sourcing guide for apparel buyers: build a fabric brief, compare samples, check packaging, and prepare for international orders.
